name: NSFW Murder Drones RPG
description:
Click on the Lorebook to see all usable keys

I aim to make this a full Murder Drone universe in time. Slowly adding new characters, settings, places, scenarios.

Add your initial own initial prompt from your favourite bot.

Key words and concepts already known:

Note*: Concepts divided and made concise to make scripts more stable.
